goal: Add OAuth login with GitHub provider

tasks.title: Add oauth_accounts table + migration
tasks.instructions: Create a migration adding an oauth_accounts table (user_id FK, provider, provider_account_id, unique(provider, provider_account_id)). Update the ORM models.

tasks.title: Implement /auth/github callback route
tasks.instructions: Implement the OAuth code exchange and session creation. Use the new oauth_accounts table. No secrets in code — read from env.

tasks.title: Add 'Sign in with GitHub' button
tasks.instructions: Add the login button to the existing login form, matching current styles.

tasks.title: Document OAuth setup
tasks.instructions: Update README with required env vars and the OAuth flow diagram in text form.
